response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrable exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of executive leadership at scale, regulated fintech deployment, or multi-agent AI production systems — critical for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems (GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Strong engineering culture contributions via testing, CI/CD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No explicit experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people or leading senior technical leaders
No demonstrated production deployment of multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops or observability for financial decisioning
